sourceSummary.oneLine: Hardware BOM listing ADI_MAIN, ADI_ROIC, ADI_GATE, and ADI_POWER PCB assemblies with quantities, references, item names, specifications, and notes.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design and development output BOM for identifying PCB assemblies and component-level hardware configuration.
keyPoints: BOM includes ADI_MAIN_PCB Ass'y, ADI_ROIC_PCB Ass'y, ADI_GATE_PCB Ass'y, and ADI_POWER_PCB Ass'y.
Each assembly section lists item number, quantity, reference, code, item name, specification, and remarks.
NC sections identify components marked not connected or not populated.

entities.name: ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000001,ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 12L_240mm x 130mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

entities.name: ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000002,ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y,FR4 8L_427mm x 41.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V007 적용

entities.name: ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000003,ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_402.5mm x 32.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V006 적용

entities.name: ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000004,ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_160mm x 55mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The document identifies itself as ADI_BD_BOM_V1.1_20221209.
The ADI_MAIN PCB assembly is AB0-000001 and uses ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000001,ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 12L_240mm x 130mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The ADI_ROIC PCB assembly is AB0-000002 and uses ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000002,ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y,FR4 8L_427mm x 41.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V007 적용

evidence.claim: The ADI_GATE PCB assembly is AB0-000003 and uses ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000003,ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_402.5mm x 32.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The ADI_POWER PCB assembly is AB0-000004 and uses ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000004,ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_160mm x 55mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The BOM table fields are item, quantity, reference, code, item name, specification, and remarks.
The BOM contains NC sections for components marked as not connected or not populated.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal only says general.
No standards are listed in the source text.
Document date is taken from the title and filename-style string 20221209, not from a separately labeled date field.
Product model is provided by source metadata productSignal, while the source text primarily identifies ADI PCB assemblies.
